summary: A website for Malhotra Packers and Movers, a moving and packing service company offering 24/7 availability. The site will display contact information, services, and use a coffee/cardboard color scheme.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Photo frame with ornate pink-accented handle or border, elegant style suitable for packing service showcase (photo-frame-pink.dim_400x400.png)
- Trophy with pink accents on base or handles, polished metallic finish (trophy-pink.dim_400x400.png)
- Antique decorative item (vase or clock) with pink handle or detailing, vintage aesthetic (antique-item-pink.dim_400x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create a homepage that displays the company name 'Malhotra Packers and Movers' with the tagline 'We help you to organise your new आशियाना'

Display contact information section showing phone numbers 9060925829 and 8076795118, email address satishkumar002299@gmail.com, and full address 'Street no 4 pravartiya colony gazipur sector 51 Faridabad Haryana 1211005'
Highlight the 24/7 service availability prominently on the homepage
Apply a coffee and cardboard color scheme throughout the website with coffee tones as primary colors and cardboard browns as complementary colors

Design a cohesive visual theme for a moving and packing service website with a professional yet warm aesthetic that reinforces trust and reliability, using the coffee/cardboard color palette with appropriate typography and layout patterns suitable for a service business
Render generated images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated for the moving truck illustration and cardboard box icon
Update homepage layout to a modern design with increased spacing between sections, larger typography hierarchy, and improved visual breathing room using Tailwind spacing utilities
Add smooth animations and transitions throughout the site including fade-in effects for sections on scroll, hover animations on interactive elements, and subtle entrance animations for content
Enhance typography and contrast by increasing font weights for headings, improving color contrast ratios for accessibility, and refining font size scales using the existing Inter font family
Add professional packing material images to the hero section as a prominent visual element that showcases the company's services
Integrate packing material images into the services section to visually represent different service offerings
Place decorative packing material images as background elements or accents throughout the page to enhance visual interest while maintaining readability
Render all generated packing material images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated directory for use throughout the site
Add prominent 'All India Services' messaging to the homepage to communicate nationwide service availability, integrated naturally with existing content sections
Create a new 'Specialty Items We Handle' section on the homepage that showcases the company's capability to pack and move delicate items such as photo frames, trophies, and antique items
Render all newly generated specialty item images as static assets in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory for use in the Specialty Items section
